completed_tasks.name: Phase 999.12 execution + code review + quality sweep
Deploy: backup, merge dev, docker compose up
Add graph orphan sweep (delete_isolated_nodes + trickle wiring)
Fix smoke/e2e conftest global skip (pytest_collection_modifyitems scoped)
Add tests/ bind-mount + pytest in Dockerfile + smoke URL 8321→8080

remaining_tasks.name: Batch FalkorDB graph writes with UNWIND
remaining_tasks.notes: CRITICAL. Sequential add_edge calls = ~1500 round-trips per large file = 470s for README.md (73 chunks), 251s for AGENTS.md (50 chunks). Fix: add batch_add_section_nodes(), batch_add_entity_nodes(), batch_add_tag_nodes(), batch_add_edges() to FalkorDBGraphStore using UNWIND. Update pipeline._populate_graph() and _frontmatter_to_graph() to collect all nodes/edges per file, then call batch methods. Base Protocol needs batch methods too. LadybugDB needs stub implementations.

remaining_tasks.name: Add graph wipe to _check_schema_version
remaining_tasks.notes: Add self._graph_store.delete_all() as step 3b in _check_schema_version (between vec_components wipe and vec_store wipe). This ensures future schema migrations start with a clean graph. Currently missing — graph was NOT wiped during today's schema migration.

remaining_tasks.name: Rewrite smoke tests against MCP
remaining_tasks.notes: REST API (/search, /status) removed in commit 98c6b99 (260425-rel). Smoke tests in tests/smoke/ still call these endpoints → JSONDecodeError at fixture setup. Must be rewritten. E2e tests (tests/e2e/) already correct (MCP). Pattern: use httpx to call MCP HTTP endpoint at http://localhost:8080/mcp, send tool calls via SSE/JSON. See tests/e2e/ for working examples.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix test_pipeline_reindex_shared_chunk.py collection error
remaining_tasks.notes: File instantiates Settings() at module level, fails at collection because DOTMD_EMBEDDING_URL not set (autouse monkeypatch is function-scope, not module-scope). Either make the import lazy or use a conftest session-scope fixture.

remaining_tasks.name: Wipe state and restart reindex
remaining_tasks.notes: After tasks 7+8 merged and tested: (1) reset sentinel: docker exec dotmd python -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('/dotmd-index/index.db'); conn.execute(\"DELETE FROM vec_config_contextual_512_50_multilingual_e5_large WHERE key='schema_version'\"); conn.commit()", (2) clear FalkorDB graph via pipeline.reindex_graph() or graph_store.delete_all(), (3) docker compose restart dotmd. Reindex starts clean with fast batched graph ops.

decisions.decision: UNWIND batch approach for graph writes (not label-specific MATCH alone)
decisions.rationale: Root cause is sequential round-trips: ~1500 calls × ~300ms = 470s/file. UNWIND collapses to 3-4 calls per file regardless of entity count. Label-specific MATCH is secondary improvement.

decisions.decision: dotmd container stopped — reindex halted at 9/734 files
decisions.rationale: Reindex ETA degraded from 9.7h to 30h after 9 files due to O(n²) graph behavior with 9587 pre-existing nodes. Not worth continuing without UNWIND batch fix.

decisions.decision: index.db.bak exists in dotmd volume as rollback

next_action: Implement UNWIND batch graph ops: add batch_add_*() methods to FalkorDBGraphStore, update pipeline._populate_graph() to collect then batch. Then add graph wipe to _check_schema_version. Run tests inside container. Then wipe state and restart container.
context_notes: Phase 999.12 dual-encoder code is correct and tested (189 unit tests + 24 e2e pass inside container). Graph correctness is fine (MERGE = no duplicates). The only problem is write performance: sequential Cypher round-trips. FalkorDB THREAD_COUNT=8 is configured but irrelevant — threads help concurrent queries, not sequential ones. The UNWIND fix is self-contained in falkordb_graph.py + pipeline._populate_graph()/_frontmatter_to_graph(). Smoke tests are broken independently (pre-existing: REST API was removed 3 days ago in 260425-rel, tests were not updated at that time — acknowledged failure).
